# fundr

> fundr is a New Zealand-based asset finance brokerage (FSP1007390) specialising in vehicle, truck, equipment and business finance for tradies, SMEs and business owners. Founded and run by Nick Sevta, fundr works with 15+ NZ lenders to arrange finance with approvals typically within 24 hours. Operates nationwide across New Zealand.

fundr is an independent finance broker, not a lender — it takes each application to a panel of 15+ NZ lenders to find the best rate and structure for the client's business and situation. Services cover vehicle finance (cars, utes, vans, luxury/prestige vehicles), truck finance (prime movers, tippers, curtainsiders, crane trucks), equipment finance (construction, medical, kitchen, gym, warehouse and more) and general business finance (working capital, cashflow, business acquisition funding). Clients deal directly with Nick Sevta throughout the process, from application to settlement.

## What We Finance

- [Vehicle Finance](https://www.fundr.co.nz/vehicle-finance.html): Cars, utes, vans, fleets and luxury/prestige vehicles for NZ businesses.
- [Ute Finance](https://www.fundr.co.nz/ute-finance.html): Any make or model work ute — Ford Ranger, Toyota Hilux, D-Max and more.
- [Truck Finance](https://www.fundr.co.nz/truck-finance.html): Prime movers, tippers, curtainsiders, crane trucks and heavy vehicles.
- [Equipment Finance](https://www.fundr.co.nz/equipment-finance.html): Construction, medical, kitchen, gym, warehouse and other business equipment.
- [Business Finance](https://www.fundr.co.nz/business-finance.html): Working capital, cashflow solutions and business acquisition funding.
- [Ford Ranger Finance](https://www.fundr.co.nz/ford-ranger-finance.html): Finance for XL, XLS, XLT, Wildtrak and Raptor models.
- [Toyota Hilux Finance](https://www.fundr.co.nz/toyota-hilux-finance.html): Finance for SR, SR5 and Rogue, single/extra/double cab.
- [Luxury Vehicle Finance](https://www.fundr.co.nz/luxury-vehicle-finance.html): Range Rover, BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Porsche — balloon payment structuring for business owners and directors.
- [What We Finance (overview)](https://www.fundr.co.nz/what-we-finance.html): Full summary of all asset classes fundr finances.

## How fundr Works

- [About Nick Sevta](https://www.fundr.co.nz/about.html): Founder background — 15+ years commercial finance experience.
- [The fundr Way](https://www.fundr.co.nz/fundr-way.html): fundr's approach — independent broker, one point of contact.
- [Our Process](https://www.fundr.co.nz/process.html): Three-step process from application to approval.
- [FAQ](https://www.fundr.co.nz/faq.html): Common questions on eligibility, costs, process and approvals.
- [Apply for Finance](https://www.fundr.co.nz/apply.html): Application form — approvals typically within 24 hours.
- [Get an Instant Quote](https://www.fundr.co.nz/quick-quote.html): 60-second indicative quote tool, no credit check.
- [Check Eligibility](https://www.fundr.co.nz/check-eligibility-full.html): Quick eligibility check for NZ businesses.
- [Finance Calculator](https://www.fundr.co.nz/calculator.html): Repayment calculator for vehicle, truck, equipment and business loans.
- [Referral Partner Programme](https://www.fundr.co.nz/referral-partners.html): For accountants, dealers and advisers referring clients to fundr.

## Guides & Insights

- [Vehicle Finance Broker NZ: Why Business Owners Use One](https://www.fundr.co.nz/Blog/vehicle-finance-broker-nz.html): How a broker compares 15+ lenders to beat bank/dealer rates.
- [Business Vehicle Finance NZ: A Practical Guide](https://www.fundr.co.nz/Blog/business-vehicle-finance-nz.html): Loan types, lender criteria, rates and application process.
- [How to Finance a Work Ute in NZ](https://www.fundr.co.nz/Blog/how-to-finance-a-work-ute-nz.html): What tradies need to know — tax benefits, lender criteria, approval speed.
- [Truck Finance NZ: A Practical Guide](https://www.fundr.co.nz/Blog/truck-finance-nz-options.html): Chattel mortgage vs lease, repayment examples, IRD Investment Boost.
- [Should You Upgrade Your Work Ute or Fleet in 2026?](https://www.fundr.co.nz/Blog/ute-finance-nz-fleet-upgrade.html): The real cost of holding on to older vehicles.
- [Business Loan vs Asset Finance in NZ](https://www.fundr.co.nz/Blog/business-loan-vs-asset-finance-nz.html): GST, tax and structural differences explained.
- [Finance Lease vs Term Loan NZ](https://www.fundr.co.nz/Blog/finance-lease-vs-term-loan-nz.html): Ownership, tax treatment and which structure suits which situation.
- [Business Finance Refinance NZ](https://www.fundr.co.nz/Blog/business-finance-refinance-nz.html): When restructuring existing finance improves cash flow.
- [IRD Investment Boost Explained](https://www.fundr.co.nz/Blog/investment-boost-for-business-growth.html): Claiming 20% of new asset costs upfront from May 2025.
- [Why Use an Asset Finance Broker in NZ](https://www.fundr.co.nz/Blog/asset-finance-broker-nz.html): How a broker builds a deal that works for your cashflow.
- [All Articles](https://www.fundr.co.nz/blog.html): Full blog index.
